This decision resolves HK-0002 by adopting the rule under governance before Sprint 7 begins so the audit chain is whole. Single-prompt ratification per the autonomy-L4 path; full nemawashi was not conducted (walkthrough_version: 0) because the rule was pre-decided by the user, the change is reversible via git revert of commit 408e8a2, and the Phase-1 telemetry corroborates that the methodology aligns with the harness mission.

description: Composite audit-chain entry for the post-Sprint-10 council fan-out. Three interlocking actions ratified under the single-prompt L4 path (user-approved batch: 'Audit chain only'): (a) Emit HK-0005 capturing the 71ce8e7 plan amendment as a Method/scope-change/active/actionable henkaten record per Henkaten Detector HK-CAND-01; the 71ce8e7 commit extended Sprint 13 deliverable (b) from a singular pre-sprint council-check gate to bidirectional gates (b1 pre-sprint + b2 post-sprint auto-trigger). The change was user-authorized in-session 2026-06-01 ('go ahead with option 1'). HK-0005 closes Scope Guardian SG7 (missing DEC for the b1→b1+b2 expansion). (b) Promote HK-0003 (Sprints 7-9 council bypass) status from classified to responded — Sprint 10 ran with the full fan-out, demonstrating per-sprint cadence resumed; structural closure pathway is institutionalized via DEC-0010 (Sprint 13 plan) + this DEC. Promotion to resolved deferred until Sprint 13 lands and ≥2 subsequent sprints exhibit the auto-trigger working. (c) Resolve Scope Guardian's andon `alert` (SG5: B7 verification command in sprint-10.md uses awk anchor `/^## Artifact 2/` which matches no heading because planner.md has `### Artifact 2:` as h3, not h2 — the gate is vacuously passing). Architect concurred in swarm follow-up; Sprint 10 PASS verdict stands (A6 invariant honored by inspection per prior A2 finding). Fix routed to Sprint 13 as a new deliverable (d) under SN2 carve-out: one-line awk anchor correction to sprint-10.md changing `/^## Artifact 2/` → `/^### Artifact 2:/` with boundary `/^## [A-Z]\|^### [A-Z]/`. Process improvement captured in retrospective LP1: future R2 fix verifications must run the literal command, not reason about it. All three actions are reversible: HK-0005 / HK-0003 edits via git revert on .council/henka-register.jsonl; Sprint 13 B7 fix has not yet been applied. Spot-check failure rate 0/4 across the fan-out (well under 20% Halt Condition 5 threshold).

description: Cycle-2 PDCA standard-work amendment. Ratified four SW candidates from /henkaten-council:council-retro under the lightweight ratify-once path. Stages 1-3 of nemawashi collapsed via the prior Sprint 10 fan-out alignment (architect, scope-guardian, henkaten-detector all concurred with the underlying findings before this retrospective formalized them) + architect L2 review on the pdca draft ('structurally sound — assemble with minor edits'). Stage 4 ratification via explicit user selection ('Yes — apply DEC-0012'). Applied: (1) PROC-001 — Generator pre-flight verification-command checklist (closes 3-sprint Evaluator-catches-contract-bug pattern across S8/S9/S10). (2) PROC-002 — Behavioral-coverage floor justification standard for contracts within 5 percentage points of the 60% floor (S8=66, S9=63, S10=62 — monotonic descent toward floor). (3) PROC-003 — R2 reviewer literal-execution protocol (closes Sprint 10 R2 vacuous-gate transcription error caught by SG5). (4) Yokoten blocks added to HK-0002 (3-way grader split + ≥60% behavioral floor as universal methodology baseline), HK-0003 (per-sprint cadence reminder — SW-CAND-D content; eligible for ratify-once shortcut per A9 with applicable_to_subsequent_sprints=['all']), and HK-0005 (post-completion plan amendments require same-session DEC entry for audit-chain wholeness). SW-CAND-E (classification reclassification protocol via loop_shapes[]) deferred to next pdca cycle per retrospective recommendation — more invasive than the other four and would benefit from another cycle of evidence. Schema cleanup applied as side effect: dropped four pre-strict-schema fields (project_type, last_updated, known_henkaten_patterns, yokoten_entries) from .council/standard-work.json that were placeholder kickoff fields the current strict schema (additionalProperties: false) rejects. Version bumped 1.0 → 1.1.0 (semver minor for additive procedures). All edits reversible via git revert.
